mapper.insert: INSERT INTO application_case (user_id, company_name, job_title, posting_date, deadline_date, source_type, status, is_favorite) VALUES (#{userId}, #{companyName}, #{jobTitle}, #{postingDate}, #{deadlineDate}, #{sourceType}, #{status}, #{favorite})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM application_case WHERE user_id = #{userId}
AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL AND deleted_at >= DATE_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL 30 DAY)
AND deleted_at IS NULL
AND archived_at IS NOT NULL
AND archived_at IS NULL
AND archived_at IS NULL
ORDER BY is_favorite DESC, updated_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM application_case WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE application_case SET company_name = #{companyName}, job_title = #{jobTitle}, posting_date = #{postingDate}, deadline_date = #{deadlineDate}, source_type = #{sourceType}, status = #{status}, is_favorite = #{favorite}, archived_at = #{archivedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE application_case SET status = 'READY' WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL AND status = 'ANALYZING' AND #{previousStatus} IN ('DRAFT', 'ANALYZING', 'READY')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM application_case WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE application_case SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE application_case SET deleted_at = NULL, archived_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO application_case_status_history (application_case_id, changed_by_user_id, previous_status, new_status, memo) VALUES (#{applicationCaseId}, #{changedByUserId}, #{previousStatus}, #{newStatus}, #{memo})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM fit_analysis WHERE application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_usage_log (user_id, application_case_id, feature_type, status, model, input_tokens, output_tokens, token_usage, credit_used, error_message) VALUES (#{userId}, #{applicationCaseId}, #{featureType}, #{status}, #{model}, #{inputTokens}, #{outputTokens}, #{tokenUsage}, #{creditUsed}, #{errorMessage})
mapper.select: SELECT failed.feature_type, failed.error_message, failed.created_at FROM ai_usage_log failed WHERE failed.application_case_id = #{applicationCaseId} AND failed.status = 'FAILED' AND failed.feature_type IN ('JOB_ANALYSIS', 'COMPANY_RESEARCH', 'JOB_POSTING_OCR', 'JOB_POSTING_METADATA') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ai_usage_log success WHERE success.application_case_id = failed.application_case_id AND success.feature_type = failed.feature_type AND success.status = 'SUCCESS' AND ( success.created_at > failed.created_at OR (success.created_at = failed.created_at AND success.id > failed.id) ) ) ORDER BY failed.created_at DESC, failed.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
